title: Manage World Events and Fronts
postconditions: Event or Front is created and assigned to a specific Tick
Event traits cascade to relevant assets from that Tick onward
trigger: GM creates a new Event or Front

main_scenario.action: GM defines a new Event or Front (Name, Type, Metadata/Traits)
GM assigns the Event to begin at a specific Tick (past, present, or future)
System saves the Event to the designated Tick
If the Event is assigned to a past or present Tick, System recalculates state inheritance for all subsequent Ticks to include the new Event's traits
System warns the GM if recalculation overwrites conflicting states in future Ticks

exceptions.action: System aborts the event creation and reverts state

acceptance_criteria: Events can be scheduled on any Tick, regardless of the 'current' chronological position.
Events placed in past Ticks automatically ripple their effects forward.
The GM is warned about downstream overwrites before they are finalized.
